benefits.description: Clearing rosacea, providing normal skin for the first time in life. Rosacea on nostrils cleared which had never cleared before despite dermatology treatment. Skin now calm and normal.

protocol_notes: Has severe rosacea and very sensitive skin. Noted that bumps disappeared in less than a week. Stopped using rosacea skincare routine as it was no longer needed. Mentions bumps are from collagen remodeling. Can lower dose or add zinc supplement.
